summary: Fixed the unasserted `git clean -fd` regression gap in `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs`. The 'reverts uncommitted changes with checkout' test now captures clean commands in the execFn mock and asserts `revertCmds.some(c => c.includes('clean'))`, ensuring the untracked-file cleanup at simplify-pass.mjs:189-193 cannot be silently removed without tests failing. All 588 tests pass.
